title: classroom50/repo-config/v1
description: Machine-readable schema for the .classroom50.yaml committed into each accepted assignment repo. Written by both the gh-student CLI (cli/gh-student/internal/classroomcfg/metadata.go) and the web GUI (classroom50-web). All keys except classroom/assignment are optional for back-compat with pre-v1 files, which predate the schema/owner/source-id keys. Intentionally NOT a closed object: the GUI reader (Classroom50YamlSchema) ignores unknown keys, and historical files may carry since-removed top-level blocks, so additionalProperties is left open.

schema.description: Versioned sentinel. Optional (pre-v1 files omit it); when present it must pin this exact value.

classroom.description: Classroom slug; one of the two always-required identity fields.

assignment.description: Assignment slug; one of the two always-required identity fields.

owner.description: Repo owner identity (the acceptor). Records both the mutable login and the immutable numeric id so the binding survives a username rename.

id.description: Immutable numeric GitHub user id; null when unresolved. A null means identity is not stabilized — a future cross-check must fall back to the username, never silently pass.

accepted_at.description: UTC instant of the accept commit (RFC3339). Client-generated and server-unattested: for human provenance only, not an authoritative time source for deadline/ordering/audit decisions.

source.description: Template repo coordinates so `gh student submit` can re-fetch instructor files. Absent for a template-less assignment.

owner_id.description: Template owner's immutable numeric id; null when the best-effort lookup failed.
